creator: joerg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Didier Garcin from comment #5)

I'd really like to see the opinion from @miwi and @bapt because they are supposed to know the problem that was attempted to be "solved" with the current (IMHO completely unusable) state.

If they still don't respond here, I suggest to just add ansidecl.h back.
